paris.highlights: Eiffel Tower, Louvre Museum, Notre-Dame, Montmartre, Seine River cruises
paris.best_time: April-June or September-October for mild weather
paris.culture: Rich art scene, café culture, fashion capital, French cuisine
paris.tips: Learn basic French phrases, metro is efficient, museums closed on Tuesdays
paris.weather: Mild summers (20-25°C), cold winters (3-7°C), rain year-round

tokyo.highlights: Shibuya Crossing, Senso-ji Temple, Akihabara, Mt. Fuji day trips, Tsukiji Market
tokyo.culture: Blend of ancient and ultra-modern, anime culture, tea ceremonies, onsen baths
tokyo.tips: Get a Suica card for transit, bow as greeting, cash still common, shoes off indoors
tokyo.weather: Hot humid summers, mild winters, rainy season in June

new york.highlights: Statue of Liberty, Central Park, Times Square, Broadway, Brooklyn Bridge
new york.best_time: April-June or September-November for pleasant weather
new york.culture: Diverse food scene, world-class museums, live music and theater
new york.tips: Get a MetroCard, walk everywhere in Manhattan, book Broadway tickets early
new york.weather: Hot summers (28-32°C), cold winters (-2 to 4°C), beautiful fall colors

rome.highlights: Colosseum, Vatican Museums, Trevi Fountain, Pantheon, Roman Forum
rome.best_time: April-May or September-October to avoid summer crowds
rome.culture: Ancient history everywhere, incredible food, gelato culture, espresso bars
rome.tips: Wear comfortable shoes, book Vatican tickets in advance, beware of pickpockets
rome.weather: Hot dry summers (30°C+), mild winters (8-12°C), very pleasant spring/fall

london.highlights: Big Ben, Tower of London, British Museum, Buckingham Palace, West End theaters
london.best_time: May-September for warmest weather and longest days
london.culture: Royal heritage, pub culture, afternoon tea, world-class theater scene
london.tips: Get an Oyster card for the Tube, carry an umbrella, tipping is 10-15%
london.weather: Cool mild climate (12-23°C summer), frequent rain, grey winters

barcelona.highlights: Sagrada Familia, Park Güell, La Rambla, Gothic Quarter, Barceloneta Beach
barcelona.best_time: May-June or September-October for warm weather without extreme heat
barcelona.culture: Catalan identity, tapas and paella, Gaudí architecture, vibrant nightlife
barcelona.tips: Watch for pickpockets on La Rambla, siesta hours 2-5pm, learn basic Spanish
barcelona.weather: Hot summers (28-30°C), mild winters (10-15°C), Mediterranean climate

sydney.highlights: Sydney Opera House, Harbour Bridge, Bondi Beach, Taronga Zoo, Blue Mountains
sydney.best_time: September-November or March-May (spring/autumn in Southern Hemisphere)
sydney.culture: Beach lifestyle, multicultural food scene, indigenous heritage, outdoor living
sydney.tips: Seasons are reversed from Northern Hemisphere, slip-slop-slap for sun safety
sydney.weather: Warm summers (25-30°C Dec-Feb), mild winters (10-17°C Jun-Aug)

bangkok.highlights: Grand Palace, Wat Pho, Chatuchak Market, Khao San Road, Chao Phraya River
bangkok.culture: Buddhist temples, street food capital, tuk-tuk rides, Thai massage tradition
bangkok.tips: Dress modestly at temples, negotiate tuk-tuk fares, street food is safe and amazing
bangkok.weather: Hot year-round (30-35°C), monsoon season June-October, high humidity

food: Cooking class with a local chef
Fine dining at a top-rated restaurant
nature: Day hike at a nearby trail

money_saving_tips: Use public transit instead of taxis
Eat at local restaurants, not tourist traps
Look for free walking tours and museum free-days
